title: Sri Chaitanya is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Sri Chaitanya is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Subject Matter Expert in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!
